节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods for accessing a database result set generated by querying the database.
Obtains the names of all columns in a result set. The column names are returned as a string array, in which the strings are in the same order as the columns in the result set.
Obtains the number of columns in the result set. The returned number is equal to the length of the string array returned by the columnCount method.
Obtains the number of rows in the result set.
Obtains the current index of the result set. The result set index starts from 0.
Checks whether the result set is positioned at the first row.
Checks whether the result set is positioned at the last row.
Checks whether the result set is positioned after the last row.
returns whether the cursor is pointing to the position before the first row.
Checks whether the current result set is closed. If the result set is closed by calling the close method, true will be returned.
Obtains the column index based on the specified column name. The column name is passed as an input parameter.
注释信息: @param { string } columnName - Indicates the name of the specified column in the result set.
@returns { number } return the index of the specified column.

parameters.说明: Indicates the name of the specified column in the result set.

节点.return_description: return the index of the specified column.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the column name based on the specified column index. The column index is passed as an input parameter.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the index of the specified column in the result set.
@returns { string } returns the name of the specified column.

parameters.说明: Indicates the index of the specified column in the result set.

节点.return_description: returns the name of the specified column.

节点.功能描述: Go to the specified row of the result set forwards or backwards by an offset relative to its current position. A positive offset indicates moving backwards, and a negative offset indicates moving forwards. returns false otherwise.
注释信息: @param { number } offset - Indicates the offset relative to the current position.
@returns { boolean } returns true if the result set is moved successfully and does not go beyond the range;

parameters.说明: Indicates the offset relative to the current position.

节点.return_description: returns true if the result set is moved successfully and does not go beyond the range;

节点.功能描述: Go to the specified row of the result set.
注释信息: @param { number } position - Indicates the index of the specified row, which starts from 0.
@returns { boolean } returns true if the result set is moved successfully; returns false otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the index of the specified row, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: returns true if the result set is moved successfully; returns false otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Go to the first row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is empty.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the last row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is empty.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the next row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is already in the last row.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Go to the previous row of the result set. returns false otherwise, for example, if the result set is already in the first row.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } returns true if the result set is moved successfully;
节点.return_description: returns true if the result set is moved successfully;

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column in the current row as a byte array. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column in the current row is null or the specified column is not of the Blob type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.
@returns { Uint8Array } returns the value of the specified column as a byte array.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: returns the value of the specified column as a byte array.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column in the current row as string. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column in the current row is null or the specified column is not of the string type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.
@returns { string } returns the value of the specified column as a string.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: returns the value of the specified column as a string.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column in the current row as long. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column in the current row is null, the specified column is not of the integer type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.
@returns { number } returns the value of the specified column as a long.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: returns the value of the specified column as a long.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the value of the specified column in the current row as double. The implementation class determines whether to throw an exception if the value of the specified column in the current row is null, the specified column is not of the double type.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.
@returns { number } returns the value of the specified column as a double.

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: returns the value of the specified column as a double.

节点.功能描述: Checks whether the value of the specified column in the current row is null. returns false otherwise.
注释信息: @param { number } columnIndex - Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.
@returns { boolean } returns true if the value of the specified column in the current row is null;

parameters.说明: Indicates the specified column index, which starts from 0.

节点.return_description: returns true if the value of the specified column in the current row is null;

节点.功能描述: Closes the result set. Calling this method on the result set will release all of its resources and makes it ineffective.
